summary: Comprehensive testing of US Bakers CRM features - Backend 100% (18/18 tests), Frontend all features verified working

issues: Shows 'No flavours added yet' even after adding - may need refresh. UI shows items after page reload.

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in /api/flavours, /api/occasions, /api/time-slots POST endpoints - doc.pop('_id', None) was missing
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed 3 create endpoints (flavours, occasions, time-slots) to remove _id before returning
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Mango_Delight flavour, TEST_Graduation occasion, TEST_11:00 PM - 12:00 AM time slot (all cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) NewOrder.js voice recording - startRecording, stopRecording, uploadVoiceRecording functions at component level (not inside handleSubmit), 2) ManageOrders.js - Cake Photo column displays, clicking opens preview modal, Status Legend visible at bottom, 3) IncentiveReport.js - Shows sales person NAMES (Rahul Kumar, Priya Sharma etc) not IDs with correct 1% incentive calculations, 4) PetPooja webhook URL - Returns actual domain URL from Request.base_url not localhost, 5) Kitchen Dashboard - Two tabs (Real-time Orders, Orders for Day) filter correctly, 6) Settings page - All CRUD for Flavours, Occasions, Time Slots working

NewOrder_Voice_Recording.details: Voice Instructions section visible, Start Recording button present, functions defined at component level outside handleSubmit

ManageOrders_Cake_Photo.details: Cake Photo column in orders table, clicking image opens preview modal with title 'Cake Photo Preview'

ManageOrders_Status_Legend.details: Status Legend section visible at bottom with all statuses: Confirmed, Ready, Out for Delivery, Reached, Delivered, Cancelled

IncentiveReport_Names.details: Shows sales person names (Rahul Kumar, Priya Sharma, Amit Singh, Sneha Gupta, Vikash Verma) with 1% incentive calculations

PetPooja_Webhook_URL.details: Uses Request.base_url dynamically, returns actual domain URL (bakery-workflow-hub.cluster-10.preview.emergentcf.cloud), not localhost

Kitchen_Dashboard_Tabs.details: Two tabs: Real-time Orders (Delivery Today), Orders for Day (All Orders Scheduled for Today) - both switching correctly

Settings_CRUD.details: CRUD operations for Flavours, Occasions, Time Slots all working - Add buttons, input fields, delete buttons present

MongoDB_ObjectId_Serialization.root_cause: After insert_one(), the doc dictionary contains MongoDB's _id which is not JSON serializable
MongoDB_ObjectId_Serialization.fix: Added doc.pop('_id', None) before returning the response in all 3 endpoints
